name: model-size-ladder
description: Representative small and medium model benchmarks for comparing latency, throughput, and backend RSS.

scenarios.name: hosted-small-complete
scenarios.statement: SELECT trim(postllm.complete(prompt => 'Reply with the single word ok.', system_prompt => 'You are a literal benchmark harness. Reply with only ok.', temperature => 0.0, max_tokens => 8));
